1.name: Fighting Style
1.description: Choose a fighting style specialty: Archery, Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection, or Two-Weapon Fighting.

1.name: Second Wind
1.description: Bonus action: regain 1d10 + Fighter level HP. Recharges on short or long rest.

2.name: Action Surge
2.description: Take one additional action on your turn. Recharges on short or long rest. Gain second use at level 17.

3.name: Martial Archetype
3.description: Choose a subclass: Champion, Battle Master, Eldritch Knight, or others.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action. Increases to 3 attacks at level 11, 4 at level 20.

9.name: Indomitable
9.description: Reroll a failed saving throw. Must use new result. Gain additional uses at levels 13 and 17.

11.name: Extra Attack (3)
11.description: Attack three times when you take the Attack action.

20.name: Extra Attack (4)
20.description: Attack four times when you take the Attack action.
